query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS socketConnections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  apiKeyId INT NOT NULL,
  socketId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  deviceId VARCHAR(255),
  platform VARCHAR(50),
  deviceInfo JSON,
  batteryLevel INT,
  batteryState VARCHAR(50),
  isCharging TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  networkType VARCHAR(50),
  isOnline TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  lastHeartbeat TIMESTAMP NULL,
  connectedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  disconnectedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (apiKeyId) REFERENCES apiKeys(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS socketMessageLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  socketConnectionId INT NOT NULL,
  messageId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('send_message', 'device_status', 'message_response', 'command', 'command_response') NOT NULL,
  direction ENUM('sent', 'received') NOT NULL,
  payload JSON,
  status ENUM('pending', 'sent', 'delivered', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  error TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (socketConnectionId) REFERENCES socketConnections(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
